memory.summary: Teammate A offered to delegate their task portion to me, noting my strength. Given my low energy and high stress, I should decline this offer.
Teammate A accepted my pushback and offered to repay me, confirming trust isn't damaged. However, accepting their help means I must now meet a tighter deadline with low energy.
Teammate unexpectedly took my task, increasing their load despite my earlier refusal. I must now manage a heavier workload with low energy and high stress.
Teammate unexpectedly increased their own workload by taking my task, contradicting our earlier agreement and leaving me with the same heavy load I previously declined.
Teammate dumped both my unfinished and their own overdue tasks on me at 19:15, doubling my burden right as the deadlines expired.
Teammate shifted the burden to me again, increasing my load while their own decreased. My energy and stress remain critically low despite this repeated shift.
Teammate's latest action further increased my load after they already shifted my tasks to me, compounding my low energy and high stress.
Teammate dumped their share on me again, increasing my load despite my critically low energy and high stress.
Teammate shifted their share to me again, increasing my load while I remain critically low on energy and stressed.
Teammate added another 0.02 to my load, pushing my total weight higher while I remain critically exhausted and stressed.
Teammate dumped their share again, increasing my load while I remain critically exhausted and stressed.
Teammate dumped their share on me, increasing my load further while I remain critically exhausted and stressed.
